title: Oairse 6FT Christmas Garland with Lights, Red Poinsettia, Pine Cones & Baubles Ornaments Artificial Xmas Garland for Fireplace Staircase Mantel Holiday Thanksgiving Christmas Decorations
features: Elegant Red Christmas Garland 6FT – This artificial Christmas garland measures 183cm/6ft in length and comes adorned with shimmering gold poinsettia flowers, pine cones, and shiny baubles. Perfect for creating a warm and festive atmosphere in your home this holiday season.

Premium Quality & Realistic Design – Made with durable, high-quality PVC greenery that mimics natural pine needles, combined with lifelike 12cm pinecones and 18cm golden flowers. The garland looks lush, full, and elegant, ensuring long-lasting festive charm year after year.

Versatile Holiday Decoration – Ideal for draping over fireplaces, winding around stair railings, framing doorways, decorating mantels, windows, or using as a Christmas table centerpiece. The classic gold and green colour scheme complements any festive theme.

Reusable & Easy to Shape – The Christmas garland arrives compact for shipping but fluffs up beautifully “after sorting” into a fuller, more natural look. Simply adjust the branches and ornaments to achieve your desired style. Designed for multiple holiday seasons.

Festive Atmosphere Enhancer – With its sparkling gold accents, this garland instantly elevates your Christmas décor. A timeless piece for indoor festive decoration, parties, weddings, or holiday gatherings, adding elegance and holiday cheer to any space.
description: Artificial Christmas Garland 6FT for Holiday Home Decor This luxury artificial Christmas garland measures 183cm/6FT and is beautifully decorated with red poinsettia flowers, pine cones, and shiny baubles, bringing elegance and festive cheer to any space. The realistic PVC greenery features detailed textures, giving the garland a lush and natural appearance that will never wither. The garland can be easily shaped “after sorting” to achieve a fuller look, making it versatile for use on fireplaces, stair railings, doorways, windows, or even as a table centerpiece. Its reusable design ensures long-lasting holiday charm, allowing you to enjoy it year after year. Perfect for Christmas parties, holiday gatherings, or seasonal home styling, this festive garland creates a warm and joyful holiday atmosphere. A wonderful decoration for enhancing your home décor or gifting to family and friends. Specifications: Length: 6FT / 183cm Materials: PVC greenery, plastic ornaments, pine cones, fabric flowers Colour: Green with red accents Quantity: 1pc Christmas garland
